title: Police and Criminal Evidence (Northern Ireland) Regulations 2026
body: "An equalities impact assessment for the the Police and Criminal Evidence (Northern Ireland) Order 1989 (Application to immigration officers and designated customs officials in Northern Ireland) and Consequential Amendments Regulations 2026.  The Home Office screens all policy changes for equality impacts on groups sharing protected characteristics, and to identify any appropriate mitigations, as required.  This is in line with our responsibilities under the Equality Act 2010 and our Public Sector Equality Duty (section 149 of the Equality Act) and our Northern Ireland Equality Scheme commitments to publish our impact assessments. "
